case_title: RAFAEL CAMPOS VS. HUMAN FABRIC LLC,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMPOS, RAFAEL AS TO DEFENDANT HUMAN FABRIC LLC, , A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMPOS, RAFAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUMAN FABRIC LLC, , A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $11,969.11 PRINCIPAL, $1,836.78 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,175.89, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
